title: Xponential Fitness - Corporate Wellness Page
meta_description: Put your employees' health first with premium wellness benefits. Xponential Fitness provides boutique fitness classes both in-studio and online.
body_markdown:
This website uses tracking technologies (collectively, “cookies”) to share your personal information with our affiliates, partners, and service providers to personalize your experience on our Online Services, including analyzing and tracking your activities on our websites, and to tailor advertising to your interests. Choosing to reject some or all cookies may impact your experience. Please see our [Privacy Policy](https://www.xponential.com/privacy-policy "Privacy Policy") for more information.
Customize Cookies
Accept All CookiesReject All Cookies
#  Enhance your corporate wellness program with diverse access to top health and wellness brands 
From strength training to barre, and everything in between – a healthier, more productive, and improved work culture awaits. 
[ Get a Free Quote ](https://www.xponential.com/corporate-wellness#banner-quote)
## With 3,000+ locations and growing, give your employees access to thousands of classes from the best brands in boutique fitness anywhere, anytime.
Local, remote, or traveling for work—our studios are wherever you are.

## Fitness that's flexible.
Xponential Fitness offers extensive live and on-demand workout options for large groups, featuring renowned instructors and a supportive community tailored to benefit your workforce.
![xplus ecosystem 2](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/xplus%20ecosystem%202.jpg)
![Ecosystem–No Integration-1](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/Ecosystem%E2%80%93No%20Integration-1.png)
![Ecosystem–Every Platform](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/Ecosystem%E2%80%93Every%20Platform.png)
### [Monthly subscription Pay one low monthly price for access ](https://www.xponential.com/corporate-wellness##)
### [No integration required No integration or complicated eligibility protocols. Launch in less than 30 days. ](https://www.xponential.com/corporate-wellness##)
### [Every popular platform End-users receive their own personal subscription which can be used to login to any Xponential+ app ](https://www.xponential.com/corporate-wellness##)
##  Reporting at your HR’s fingertips 
Your HR will have access to view who's using their subscriptions, and how many times they're using it a month.
![Graphs](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/Graphs.png)
##  Speak with us today and find out how you can elevate employee well-being
